tracks.title: Empty Carton
tracks.caption: 甘いもの（日常のささやかな幸福）を失ったこと、罪悪感と後悔を抱えた静かな懺悔のシーンを描いたバラード。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ooh)
(I did not mean to)
(So cold)

[Verse 1]
The house is finally still
I walk across the floor with heavy feet
The kitchen door opens wide
And the white light finds me standing here
I am reaching for the silver handle
Looking for a comfort I do not deserve
My heart starts to race
Because I know what I am about to do

[Chorus]
Oh I have taken the sweetness away
I have stolen what was meant for everyone
It melts upon my tongue like a heavy lie
And the chill is deep inside my soul
I am down on my knees in the kitchen
Praying you will find it in your heart 
To forgive this selfish thing I have done
(Forgive me)
(I was weak tonight)

[Verse 2]
I see the marks of the spoon
The empty space where the joy used to be
I thought it would make me feel whole
But I only feel the winter in my chest
You were saving this for a special day
Now there is nothing left but a cardboard shell
I cannot look you in the eye tomorrow
When the morning sun reveals my crime

[Chorus]
Oh I have taken the sweetness away
I have stolen what was meant for everyone
It melts upon my tongue like a heavy lie
And the chill is deep inside my soul
I am down on my knees in the kitchen
Praying you will find it in your heart 
To forgive this selfish thing I have done
(So selfish)
(The sweetness is gone)

[Bridge]
(Spoken)
I know I promised I would wait. I know we talked about having that sundae bar with the kids on Sunday afternoon. But I was restless. The house was so quiet, and that carton... it was calling my name. I didn't mean to eat the whole thing. I just started, and I couldn't stop. Please, don't look at me like that. I will go to the store as soon as the doors open. I will make it right. I promise. I will be a better person for you.

[Chorus]
Oh I have taken the sweetness away
(I took it all)
I have stolen what was meant for everyone
(It was for us)
It melts upon my tongue like a heavy lie
And the chill is deep inside my soul
I am down on my knees in the kitchen
(Begging you)
Praying you will find it in your heart 
To forgive this selfish thing I have done

[Outro]
It was so cold
(So cold)
I am so sorry
(I am so sorry)
The carton is empty now
(Nothing left)
Just the light and my shame
(In the light)
(Oh)
(Forgive me)

tracks.title: Chapter Thirteen
tracks.caption: 長い努力の末、一度立ち止まり、完成したものを封印するような、静かで達成感に満ちた瞬間を描写したサウンドトラック。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Oooooh)
(Oooooh)

[Verse]
I am sitting on the floor with my legs crossed
My voice sounds like I have been eating gravel
That was twelve songs of trying way too hard
And this is the one where I finally breathe
There is a dark stain on my left sleeve
From the sandwich I bought at the gas station
The red light on the box finally went out
I am just looking at the dust in the air

[Chorus]
This is thirteen
The one where I stop talking for a while
I am tired but I am proud of the mess
We made something that didn't exist before
And now I am going to put it away

[Verse]
You stayed for every single minute of it
Through the screaming and the awkward quiet parts
I told you about my mother in the fifth one
And I lied about being okay in the fourth
The tape is hissing like a radiator in winter
My throat feels like a bruised peach
But it was worth the three weeks of rain
And the way my hands wouldn't stop shaking

[Chorus]
This is thirteen
The one where I stop talking for a while
I am tired but I am proud of the mess
We made something that didn't exist before
And now I am going to put it away

[Bridge]
I don't know how to be a person without a melody
My head is heavy like a bag of wet laundry
I want to walk to the park and sit on a bench
And not think about the way my heart beats
(Not think about it)
(Not think about it)
I am closing the loop now
The circle is finished

[Outro]
I am so tired
(So tired)
But I did it for us
(Did it for us)
That is all I have left to say
(All I have)
Goodnight
(Goodnight)
Goodnight
(Goodnight)
I am turning off the light now
(Off the light)
(Goodnight)

tracks.title: Unmasked Resolve
tracks.caption: 完璧な鎧を脱ぎ捨て、傷を受け入れた真の姿で立つ。自己受容と再生をテーマに、魂から力強く歌い上げる瞬間を描きます。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Oh oh oh)
(Oh oh oh)

[Verse 1]
Polished surface hiding every crack
Tighten the grip on this heavy shield
I painted a smile to survive the day
A perfect statue carved from ice
But the heat underneath is starting to rise
My pulse is a drum beat I can’t ignore
Trembling hands reach for the edge

The air is thin at this height
My lungs are heavy with unspoken words
One step across the boundary line
I’m letting go of the safety I knew

[Chorus]
Take a look at the fragments falling down
This is the person I was scared to be
Cracked and bleeding but finally alive
The weight of the promise is lifting now
No more hiding in the silent dark
Witness the fire burning through the glass
I am standing right here
(I am standing right here)

[Verse 2]
Scars are the maps of where I have been
Not a weakness but a sign of the fight
You saw the truth behind the hollow gaze
And didn't turn your eyes away
Now the wind carries the dust of the mask

[Pre-Chorus 2]
The sky is wide and violent
I feel the sting of the freezing rain
But the heat in my chest is a beacon light
I’m crossing over to the other side

[Chorus 2]
Take a look at the fragments falling down
This is the person I was scared to be
Cracked and bleeding but finally alive
The weight of the promise is lifting now
No more hiding in the silent dark
Witness the fire burning through the glass
I am standing right here
(I am standing right here)

[Bridge]
I used to think that being strong 
Meant never showing where I’m broken
But the light only enters through the gaps
Do you see me?
(Do you see me?)
Can you hear the sound of the real me?
(Hear the sound)
I am screaming at the vast blue sky
I won't hide anymore

[Chorus]
Take a look at the fragments falling down
This is the person I was scared to be
Cracked and bleeding but finally alive
The weight of the promise is lifting now
No more hiding in the silent dark
Witness the fire burning through the glass
I am standing right here
(I am standing right here)

[Outro]
Across the horizon we go
Unmasked and ready for the storm
(Oh oh oh)
I am finally here
(Finally here)
I’m breathing free 
(Free)
Stay with me 
(Stay with me)
The journey begins now 
(Now)

tracks.title: L'Instant Paisible
tracks.caption: 朝のテラス席で体験する穏やかな時間の流れ。湯気や光景といった日常の「小さな断片」から、内側にある静けさと平穏な美しさを発見する詩情豊かな音。」

[Intro]

Le temps est un cercle qui revient nous voir
Je respire l'air frais qui sent la pluie passée
Chaque seconde est un cadeau qu'on oublie souvent
La ville respire doucement sous ses toits gris
Je ferme les yeux pour mieux entendre le vide
C'est ici que je trouve ma propre paix intérieure
Loin de l'agitation et des courses folles

[Chorus]
C'est la beauté des instants ordinaires (ordinaires)
Le flux de la vie qui nous porte sans effort
Une mélodie qui s'installe dans le silence complet
Simplement être là, face au jour qui se lève
Le cycle continue, paisible et sincère (sincère)

[Verse]

La solitude est une amie qui ne juge pas

Le ciel est un océan sans aucune vague apparente

Le vent tourne les pages d'un livre oublié
On cherche souvent le bonheur dans le futur lointain

Une fleur sauvage pousse entre deux dalles froides
La vie s'entête avec une grâce infinie
Je n'ai pas besoin de mots pour cela
La gratitude est un chant sans aucune note
Le soleil monte et la buée disparaît lentement

[Outro]
Le jour s'installe doucement (doucement)
La boucle est bouclée pour ce matin-là
(Tout est calme maintenant)
(Le jour se lève)
(Paisible)

tracks.title: Save Point

[Verse 2]

Social battery drained to nothing at all

The menu opens with a soft chime
Everything here has a fixed price

In this 16-bit space I am safe

Keeping the quiet night away from me
I am a legend in this town (legend)
Even if I am just standing still
The pixels make more sense than life

[Outro]
One more coin in the slot (one more)
Stay with me until the lights dim
Don't let the game over screen show
I am not ready to go home yet
(Not yet)

I am staying here

tracks.title: The Future Table
tracks.caption: 完璧に整えられた食卓が示す、未来への温かい約束。過酷な旅路も日常の豊かさに溶け込む瞬間を切り取ります。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ah-ah-ah)

[Verse 1]

The air began to taste like ozone
A message wrapped in folding light
I held my breath and tore the edge
Expecting words of fire and rain

[Chorus]
The transmission came from years ahead
Waiting for a sign to change my life

Warm bread and butter on the side
(On the side)
Everything is perfect here today
(Right here today)
The future wants me to be fed

[Verse 2]

I look at the horizon burning
And think about the taste of thyme
The gravity feels light as feathers
Now I know the end of every path

[Chorus]
The transmission came from years ahead
Waiting for a sign to change my life

Warm bread and butter on the side

(Right here today)

Heavy skies and simple little things

The grand design is just a feast

(A simple feast)

[Chorus]
The transmission came from years ahead
Waiting for a sign to change my life
It says the table should be set
Warm bread and butter on the side
(On the side)
Everything is perfect here today
(Right here today)
The future wants me to be fed

Stay right here
(Stay right here)

(Boiling now)
Just today
(Just today)

tracks.title: The New Design
tracks.caption: 無意識の行動や習慣が、深い回想と再会への予感へと変わっていく過程を描く、緻密な感情の動き。

(Your name)
Your name is in the room
(Your name)

Your name is on my tongue
(Your name)
Your name is in the room
(Your name)

(Your name)

I say it out loud

tracks.title: True Shape (Bright Edition)

[Intro]
(La la la la)

Walking home across the damp asphalt

Pressing down on everything I owe

(So much pride)
I am a queen in plastic boots
The pavement turns to sparkling dust
I am brave for no reason at all
(No reason at all)

[Verse 2]

A moving ship of yellow plastic seats

But here under the orange lamp
I find a sudden surge of pride

The pavement turns to sparkling dust
I am brave for no reason at all
(No reason at all)

But here under the orange lamp

You let it sit

But you are far too busy living
(Living well)

[Verse 2]

Standing on a wide balcony with a glass of water

Then turned back to watch the birds in the park
You didn't reach for a pen or a stamp or a seal
You didn't look like someone with a debt to pay

[Chorus]
You saw the ink
You let it sit
(Let it sit)
No reply is the best news
(Best news)

But you are far too busy living
(Living well)

[Bridge]

The root doesn't ask for the branch

[Chorus]
You saw the ink
You let it sit
(Let it sit)
No reply is the best news

tracks.title: No Questions Asked
tracks.caption: 言葉を交わす必要もない、ただ静かに存在し合う空間。「無条件の寄り添い」がもたらす深い安らぎと温かい感情を描き出している。

[Intro]
(Mmm)
(Yeah)

tracks.title: The Resonance
tracks.caption: 音楽の力によって特別な結びつきを感じる瞬間。「響き（レゾナンス）」が、心と心を一つにする感動的な情景を描いた楽曲だ。
